---
title: "Research design form"
format: docx
---

### General description

|                           |                                                                                   |
|:--------------------------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1. **Name of the group**  |                                                                                   |
| 2. **Research question**  |                                                                                   |
| 3. **Intervention**       |                                                                                   |
| 4. **Control**            |                                                                                   |
| 5. **Unit of analysis**   |                                                                                   |
| 6. **Ethics**             |                                                                                   |

### M — Model

|                           |                                                                                   |
|:--------------------------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 7. **N**                  |                                                                                   |
| 8. **Main hypothesis**    |                                                                                   |

### I — Inquiry

|                           |                                                                                   |
|:--------------------------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 9. **Estimand**           |                                                                                   |

### D — Data strategy

|                           |                                                                                   |
|:--------------------------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 10. **Randomization**     |                                                                                   |
| 11. **Main outcome**      |                                                                                   |

### A — Answer strategy

|                           |                                                                                   |
|:--------------------------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 12. **Estimator**         |                                                                                   |
| 13. **Standard error**    |                                                                                   |

## Diagnosis

|                           |                                                                                   |
|:--------------------------|:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 14. **Bias**              |                                                                                   |
| 15. **Statistical power** |                                                                                   |
